stories.title: East playoff takeaways: Knicks dominate Hawks in G...
stories.summary: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Eastern Conference's first round.

stories.title: Clark's Fever homecoming soured by early exit
stories.summary: Caitlin Clark exited the Fever's preseason home opener vs. the Wings after colliding with Dallas forward Alanna Smith, but said afterward she was OK.

stories.title: Maxey, George deliver as Sixers push Celts to G7
stories.summary: In perhaps their best all-around game of the season, the Sixers got strong performances from Tyrese Maxey, Paul George and Joel Embiid to win 106-93 and force a Game 7 against the Celtics.

stories.title: Jokic on early exit: Nuggets 'far' from contention...
stories.summary: Nikola Jokic said he wants to be "a Nugget forever" following the team's first-round exit from the playoffs, but acknowledged the team is "far away" from title contention.

stories.title: Wolves eliminate Nuggets as McDaniels scores 32
stories.summary: Jaden McDaniels had 32 points and 10 rebounds as Minnesota eliminated Denver with a 110-98 victory in Game 6 on Thursday night.
